creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Nothing in the current FreeBSD ports tree specifies devel/libhandy0 as a dependency.

There is a newer libhandy 0.80.0 upstream, and it addresses the newer version of glade, but that was created in 2020.  And since then, the upstream repo is no longer maintained (read-only & only available for archival purposes).
